title: agrostis densiflora
intro: Agrostis densiflora, also known as dense spike grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agrostis densiflora include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and relieving symptoms of allergies and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
